description:
Compile-time AST manipulation. quote turns code into AST values; unquote splices values back in. defmacro defines a function that runs at compile time and returns AST.

Needs:
- AST values reified as fz values (so quote returns a real value)
- Macro expansion pass between parse and type-check
- Hygiene story (probably gensym-based, like Elixir)

Big and depends on the typer being further along.
title: Elixir-style macros: defmacro / quote / unquote
